---
title: "Day 5"
author: "Simon Guest"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    center-title-slide: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: [default, ../../theme/dark.scss]
    logo: ../../theme/codercub.jpg
    highlight-style: dracula
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0e1a 0%, #0d2137 60%, #1a1f35 100%)"

---

## Recap

- TBD


## Using your model in code

- Reload the project
- Edit in MakeCode
- Go through detecting movement / playing sounds/showing icon
- How to then download everything on to running hardware

## Hands-on

- Try this

## Project Time

- Rest of class will be free-form project
- Ideas of what you can create:
  - Exercise app
  - Light switch clapper
  
## Reflect and Share

- What did you build?
